settings.title: Settings

settings.appearanceDescription: Customize how the application looks and feels
settings.productUpdatesDescription: Hear about new features and improvements

home.badge: Ready to use · Next.js 16 + NextAuth v5
home.heroDescription: A production-ready SaaS starter kit with Next.js 16, NextAuth.js v5, Auth0, Tailwind CSS v4, and TypeScript. Ship faster with authentication already set up.
home.featuresSubtitle: Stop reinventing the wheel. Start with a solid foundation and focus on what makes your product unique.
home.ctaSubtitle: Join developers building with the Next.js Auth Start Kit.
home.feature1Description: Pre-built authentication flows with Auth0, including login, signup, and refresh tokens.
home.feature2Description: Built on the latest Next.js with App Router, Server Components, and blazing fast Turbopack.
home.feature3Description: Full i18n support with next-intl. Supports English, Portuguese, Spanish, French, and German.
home.feature4Description: Full type safety with strict TypeScript, including typed API routes and session data.
home.feature5Description: Automatic theme switching with next-themes. Respects system preferences.
home.feature6Description: Unit/component tests with Vitest + Testing Library, E2E tests with Playwright.
